longformSteps.content:
The Hook: What happens when the demand for a performance threatens the purity of your worship? Nate Bean finally tells the truth about surviving Music City.

The Summary: In this raw episode of Sacrificial Conversations, Teddy & Monica sit down with Nashville gospel legend and choir director Nate Bean (founder of 4Given). Broadcasted directly from the WFTB 104.1 TabNashville studios, Nate gets brutally honest about the sacrifices required to maintain the anointing in a city obsessed with the music business.

Timestamps:
* 0:00 Intro: The Reality of Nashville
12:45 The Argument: Ministry vs. Industry
24:30 Why 4Given Sounds Different
38:00 The "Sacrifice": Giving Up the Ego
51:15 Navigating Church Politics
1:05:00 Final Thoughts & A Word of Hope

Links: 📻 Catch the live broadcast every Monday on WFTB 104.1 FM TabNashville! | Follow us: @sacrificial.convo

Share Your Story on the Teddy & Monica Show! 📻
Are you making a positive impact in Nashville? We are currently looking for inspiring guests to join us on the Teddy & Monica Show, broadcasting locally on WFTB 104.1FM and streaming globally on our YouTube podcast, Sacrificial Conversations.
We love diving into meaningful discussions about faith, real life, and the uplifting work happening right here in our community.

Who We’re Looking For:
Community Leaders & Advocates
Artists & Creatives
Entrepreneurs & Business Owners
Anyone with a powerful, faith-driven story to tell!

Why Join Us?
Expand your reach with double the exposure. Your interview will air on traditional FM radio and stream as a video podcast on YouTube, giving your message and your work maximum visibility.

Ready to Book Your Spot?
We would love to hear from you. Reach out to us today to schedule your appearance:

📱 Facebook: Send us a DM at https://www.facebook.com/theodore.chisom/
